STS2_WINEFOX-STRESS_POWER.title: Stress
STS2_WINEFOX-STRESS_POWER.description: Provided by the Hand Crank. When gaining materials, consume 1 stack to double the amount gained.

STS2_WINEFOX-DIGGING_POWER.title: Digging
STS2_WINEFOX-DIGGING_POWER.description: Improves mining efficiency. The higher the stacks, the more materials gathered per dig.
STS2_WINEFOX-DIGGING_POWER.smartDescript: Improves mining efficiency. The higher the stacks, the more materials gathered per dig.

STS2_WINEFOX-IRON_POWER.title: Iron Ingot
